column1: mysql> select b.*, p.* for branch b join property p on Bcity = Pcity;

ERROR 1064 (42000): You have an error in your SQL syntax; check the manual that corresponds to your MySQL server version for the right syntax to use near 'branch b join property p on Bcity = Pcity' at line 1
mysql> select b.*, p.* from branch b join property p on Bcity = Pcity;
mysql> select b.*, p.* from branch b join property p on b.Bcity = p.Pcity;
mysql> select b.*, p.* from branch b join property p on trim(Bcity) = trim(Pcity);
mysql> -- we use trim because there is some front spaces
